---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new feature or enhancement for dga-sentinel
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A clear and concise description of the feature you are proposing.

## Motivation / Use Case

Why is this feature needed? What problem does it solve? Who benefits?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you have in mind. Include API changes, configuration additions, or
architecture impact if applicable.

## Alternatives Considered

What other approaches did you consider, and why is this solution preferred?

## Component(s) Affected

- [ ] Gateway (FastAPI)
- [ ] Scoring Service (XGBoost / TensorFlow)
- [ ] DAG Engine (LangGraph pipelines)
- [ ] Agent Layer (A2A / MCP)
- [ ] Frontend (React)
- [ ] Observability (Prometheus / Grafana / Jaeger)
- [ ] Infrastructure / Docker Compose
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other: ___

## Acceptance Criteria

List the conditions that must be true for this feature to be considered complete:

- [ ] ...
- [ ] ...

## Additional Context

Any diagrams, references, or related issues.
